title: expression that should evaluate to FALSE evaluates to TRUE in SELECT query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test4 (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, value BOOLEAN, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test4 (value, description) VALUES (0, 'Test case 1');
INSERT INTO test4 (value, description) VALUES (1, 'Test case 2');
SELECT id FROM test4 WHERE value = 0 AND (value OR 1) AND (0 AND (0 OR 0));
SELECT * FROM test4 WHERE NOT value AND (value OR 0) AND (1 OR (0 AND 1));
key_bug_features: FALSE evaluates to TRUE in SELECT query conditions
